en_title: 'We Are Deeply Saddened' - Games Retailers and Historians Respond to PlayStation Abandoning Physical Media
cn_title: PlayStation放弃实体光盘，零售商和历史学家深感悲伤
subtitle: 实体派寒冬
opus_summary: PlayStation将于2028年1月停止生产游戏光盘，引发游戏历史保存组织、实体媒介倡导者Lost in Cult、GOG和GameStop等回应。多方担忧数字游戏长期保存与下一代主机实体媒介前景。

paragraphs.en: The gaming industry is not responding well to the news that PlayStation will stop producing game discs in January 2028.
paragraphs.cn: PlayStation将于2028年1月停止生产游戏光盘的消息，并没有在游戏行业内得到积极回应。

paragraphs.en: The noting that while the news is diappointing, it is also hardly surprising. The organization noted that the industry has moved away from true physical media support for years, with many physical games still requiring a download from the internet, while others like . The organization used this as an opportunity to ask the industry to take action and preserve games.
paragraphs.cn: 有组织指出，虽然这条消息令人失望，但也并不令人意外。该组织表示，多年来，行业一直在远离真正的实体媒介支持，许多实体游戏仍然需要从互联网下载内容，另一些游戏也存在类似情况。该组织借此机会呼吁行业采取行动，保存游戏。

paragraphs.en: "What continues to baffle us is what the industry expects institutions like ours to do about it," said the organization. "If platform owners are deciding to eliminate physical media and older digital storefronts, then we'd also like to see trade groups like the Entertainment Software Association offer meaningful solutions for archives and museums to legally preserve digital-only content and make it accessible for research.
paragraphs.cn: 该组织表示：「真正让我们持续困惑的是，行业到底期待我们这样的机构对此做什么。如果平台持有者决定淘汰实体媒介和旧数字商店，那么我们也希望看到Entertainment Software Association这样的行业组织，为档案馆和博物馆提供有意义的解决方案，让它们能够合法保存纯数字内容，并让这些内容可用于研究。」

paragraphs.en: "Everyone agrees this is a serious problem, but the ESA has repeatedly opposed the efforts of cultural heritage institutions to reform digital copy protection laws to make it easier to do this work. The industry needs to meaningfully come to the table on this issue, because asking museums to download a copy of Grand Theft Auto VI and hope it'll run in 50 years is not a preservation solution."
paragraphs.cn: 「所有人都同意这是一个严重问题，但ESA一再反对文化遗产机构改革数字复制保护法律的努力，而这些改革本可以让这项工作更容易完成。行业需要真正坐到桌前讨论这个问题，因为要求博物馆下载一份《GTA6》，然后希望它50年后还能运行，这不是保存方案。」

paragraphs.en: Lost in Cult, a botique gaming book publisher and advocate of physical media, also released a statement noting that it is "deeply saddened" by the news, but will do whatever it can to preserve video games.
paragraphs.cn: 游戏书籍小众出版商、同时也是实体媒介倡导者的Lost in Cult也发布声明称，它对这条消息「深感悲伤」，但会尽其所能保存电子游戏。

paragraphs.en: "As a company on a mission to preserve video games, we are deeply saddened by the recent news from PlayStation on ending physical disc production from 2028," said the company. "We aim to do everything in our power to preserve video games to the best of our ability and will continue to do so for as long as we can."
paragraphs.cn: 该公司表示：「作为一家以保存电子游戏为使命的公司，我们对PlayStation从2028年起结束实体光盘生产的最新消息深感悲伤。我们旨在竭尽所能、尽我们最大能力保存电子游戏，并会在力所能及的时间里继续这样做。」

paragraphs.en: GOG, a DRM-free PC storefront, chimed in to note that it doesn't revoke access to digitally-owned games even if a title is delisted from its store.
paragraphs.cn: 无DRM PC商店GOG也加入讨论，指出即使某款游戏从其商店下架，它也不会撤销用户对数字游戏的访问权。

paragraphs.en: Even if a game vanishes from the GOG storefront, it never leaves your library.
paragraphs.cn: 即便一款游戏从GOG商店消失，它也永远不会离开你的库。

paragraphs.en: Exactly as digital ownership ought to be.
paragraphs.cn: 这才是数字所有权应该有的样子。

paragraphs.en: Prominent gaming retailer GameStop found itself part of the discourse, as well. The retailer shared a photo showing a customer trading in their Xbox 360 collection for over $1,000 of in-store credit, allowing him to purchase a haul of PS5 games. Naturally, many mocked not only the irony of the situation, but also the seemingly low trade value for such a massive stack of games.
paragraphs.cn: 知名游戏零售商GameStop也卷入了这场讨论。该零售商分享了一张照片，显示一名顾客用自己的XBOX 360收藏换取了超过1000美元（约合人民币7190元）店内积分，从而购买了一大批PS5游戏。自然，许多人不仅嘲笑这件事的讽刺意味，也嘲笑如此庞大一摞游戏似乎只换到了这么低的折抵价值。

paragraphs.en: A GameStop Customer in Columbus, Ohio traded his old Xbox 360 collection for over $1,000 in store credit. Left with new PS5 games and very happy! pic.twitter.com/h6ihTeVlxz
paragraphs.cn: 「俄亥俄州哥伦布市的一名GameStop顾客用自己的旧XBOX 360收藏换取了超过1000美元（约合人民币6790元）店内积分。最后带着新的PS5游戏离开，非常开心！」

paragraphs.en: As if this wasn't all enough drama for one day, a report also came out claiming that the next Xbox won't have a disc drive and that Microsoft is exploring ways to digitize physical libraries. All in all, it's a rough week to be a physical media lover, leaving many concerned for the next-generation of consoles .
paragraphs.cn: 仿佛一天的风波还不够多，随后又有报道称，下一代XBOX不会配备光驱，微软正在探索数字化实体游戏库的方式。总而言之，对实体媒介爱好者来说，这是艰难的一周，也让许多人开始担心下一代主机。

pending_dict.note: 小众出版商名，暂无通行中文名，保留原文。
